name: Alert Hub Agent
desc: Enterprise multi-channel notification platform processing high-volume alerts daily across Email, SMS, Push, JMS, and File channels with AI-powered agentic routing.
fullDesc:
Alert Hub Agent is an enterprise-grade, AI-integrated multi-channel notification platform built at Tata Consultancy Services. It processes high volumes of alerts daily, routing them intelligently across Email, SMS, Push Notifications, JMS, ActiveMQ, and File channels.

The system uses Spring AI with Groq/Ollama LLM integration and @Tool-annotated methods for agentic routing decisions. It includes a hybrid PostgreSQL + Redis chat history, SSE streaming via Flux<AgentStreamEvent>, virtual threads for non-blocking I/O, and a full guardrail pipeline covering topic restriction, rate limiting, input validation, and harmful input blocking.

Kafka handles the event backbone with consumer groups, partition scaling, and offset management. The architecture supports millions of alerts per day with sub-second routing latency.
highlights: Processes millions of alerts per day with sub-second routing latency
AI-powered channel selection using Spring AI + Groq LLM
Full guardrail pipeline: rate limiting, topic restriction, input validation
SSE streaming with Flux<AgentStreamEvent> for real-time updates
Virtual threads (Java 21) for non-blocking concurrent processing
Received Star Performer & On-the-Spot Award at TCS for this project

name: DocMind
tagline: AI-Powered RAG + Agentic AI Knowledge Platform
desc: Context-aware AI system that combines RAG and agentic workflows to deliver accurate, grounded responses from documents and websites.
fullDesc:
DocMind is an AI-powered RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) + Agentic AI platform designed to build intelligent, context-aware applications. It enables users to ingest documents and websites (including dynamic SPA applications) and interact with them through a conversational interface.

The system uses hybrid search (keyword + semantic) and reranking to retrieve highly relevant context, significantly improving accuracy and reducing hallucinations. It also introduces agentic capabilities through tool integration (e.g., web scraping), allowing the AI to perform multi-step reasoning and actions.

Built with Spring Boot and Spring AI, DocMind supports multi-user environments, secure APIs, and scalable architecture. The platform is designed for real-world use cases such as knowledge assistants, enterprise search, and AI-powered copilots.
highlights: Hybrid search (keyword + semantic) with reranking for high-accuracy retrieval
Agentic AI with tool integration (web scraping, external data fetching)
Multi-source ingestion: PDFs, DOCX, PPTX, and dynamic websites (SPA)
Context-aware conversational AI with session memory
Scalable RAG pipeline built with Spring AI and vector database
Supports real-world use cases like knowledge assistants and AI copilots

name: Lustre
desc: A seamless online shopping experience tailored for Men's, Women's, and Kids' fashion, built with microservices architecture using Spring Cloud Gateway and Eureka.
fullDesc:
Lustre is a full-featured e-commerce web application for fashion retail, covering Men's, Women's, and Kids' categories. The backend is architected as microservices with Spring Cloud Gateway for API routing and Eureka for service discovery.

Product images and media are managed through Cloudinary. MySQL handles transactional data (orders, users, payments) while MongoDB stores the product catalogue for flexible schema management. ReactJS powers the frontend with a clean, responsive shopping experience.

Features include user authentication, product browsing with filters, cart management, order tracking, and admin product management.
highlights: Microservices architecture with Spring Cloud Gateway and Eureka service discovery
Dual database strategy: MySQL for transactions, MongoDB for product catalogue
Cloudinary integration for product image storage and CDN delivery
Men's, Women's, and Kids' fashion categories with filter and search
Cart management, order tracking, and admin dashboard
JWT-based authentication and role-based access control

name: FitSync
desc: A fitness tracker to log workouts, monitor progress, and get AI-powered personalized tips using Cohere AI.
fullDesc:
FitSync is an AI-powered fitness tracking platform that helps users log workouts, track progress over time, and receive personalized training tips generated by Cohere AI.

The backend is built on Spring Boot with JWT authentication. MongoDB stores flexible workout logs while MySQL manages user profiles and structured data. Cloudinary handles profile and progress images. The React frontend features interactive charts and a clean workout logging UI.
highlights: AI-powered personalized fitness tips via Cohere AI
Workout logging with progress tracking and charts
Dual database: MongoDB for logs, MySQL for user data
Cloudinary for profile and progress photo management
JWT-based authentication
Responsive React frontend with interactive analytics

name: Zervings
desc: An AI-powered recipe generator that creates personalized recipes based on available ingredients and dietary preferences using Cohere AI.
fullDesc:
Zervings is an AI-powered recipe generation platform. Users input available ingredients and dietary preferences, and the system generates customized recipes with step-by-step instructions powered by Cohere AI.

The backend uses Spring Boot with MySQL for structured recipe and user data. Cloudinary handles recipe and dish images. The React frontend features an intuitive ingredient input UI and a clean recipe card display.
highlights: AI recipe generation from available ingredients via Cohere AI
Dietary preference filtering (vegan, gluten-free, etc.)
Cloudinary integration for dish imagery
Step-by-step recipe instructions
MySQL for recipe and user data persistence
Clean React UI with ingredient input and recipe cards

name: PlotCraft
desc: An interactive platform for dynamic text generation, enabling users to create and expand stories seamlessly using AI.
fullDesc:
PlotCraft is an AI-powered story builder platform that enables users to create, expand, and manage stories through dynamic text generation powered by Cohere AI.

Users can start a story with a prompt and let the AI continue the narrative, or write their own and use AI to suggest the next scene. MongoDB stores story documents for flexible schema management while PostgreSQL handles user data. Cloudinary manages cover images for user stories.
highlights: AI-powered dynamic story continuation via Cohere AI
Interactive story building with user-guided narrative
MongoDB for flexible story document storage
PostgreSQL for structured user and session data
Cloudinary for story cover image management
Story library with create, edit, and expand capabilities

name: TaskFlow
desc: Effortlessly manage teams, projects, and tasks by organizing projects under teams and assigning tasks for efficient tracking.
fullDesc:
TaskFlow is a comprehensive task management platform for teams. Users can create teams, organize projects under teams, and assign tasks with priorities and deadlines.

Built with Spring Boot and MySQL, the application features JWT authentication, role-based access, and Cloudinary for file attachments. The React frontend delivers a clean kanban-style board with drag-and-drop task management.
highlights: Team-based project and task organization
Kanban board with task assignment and priority levels
Role-based access: team admin and member roles
JWT authentication with Spring Security
Cloudinary for file and image attachments
MySQL for all structured relational data

name: Eventura
desc: A platform that allows users to host and book events, featuring distinct roles for hosts and general users.
fullDesc:
Eventura is an event management platform where users can either host events or book seats as attendees. The platform supports two distinct roles — host and attendee — each with their own dashboard and capabilities.

Built with Spring Boot and PostgreSQL, the system handles event creation, seat booking, and user management. The React frontend offers separate host and user flows with event browsing, booking confirmation, and host analytics.
highlights: Dual role system: event hosts and attendees
Event creation with date, venue, and capacity management
Seat booking with confirmation flow
Host dashboard with event analytics
PostgreSQL for structured event and booking data
JWT authentication with role-based access

name: GlobeTales
desc: A platform for users to share travel blogs, discover destinations, and connect with fellow travellers.
fullDesc:
GlobeTales is a travel blogging platform where users can write and share their travel experiences, discover destination guides, and connect with fellow travellers.

The backend uses Spring Boot with MongoDB for flexible blog document storage and MySQL for user and relationship data. Cloudinary handles travel photos and blog cover images. The React frontend delivers a clean editorial-style blog reading experience.
highlights: Travel blog creation with rich text and photo uploads
Destination discovery and category browsing
MongoDB for flexible blog document storage
MySQL for user profiles and follow relationships
Cloudinary for travel photo CDN delivery
Editorial-style React frontend for immersive reading

name: Inmakes Infotech
desc: End-to-end Java full-stack development across multiple client projects during internship, covering Spring Boot, Hibernate, MySQL, and ReactJS.
fullDesc:
During my internship at Inmakes Infotech (Mar 2024 – Sep 2024), I focused on Java-based full-stack development across multiple client projects covering the complete lifecycle from conceptualization to deployment.

Key responsibilities included backend development with Spring Boot and Hibernate ORM, efficient MySQL data management, RESTful API design, and building dynamic ReactJS frontends.
highlights: End-to-end development across multiple client-facing projects
Spring Boot + Hibernate ORM backend architecture
MySQL schema design and query optimization
RESTful API design and third-party API integration
Dynamic ReactJS frontend interfaces
Delivered from conceptualization to production deployment
